final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a cultural brand or festival celebration, themed around Dunhuang flying apsaras (飞天) in modern Guochao illustration style.

Style/medium: Guochao illustration blending traditional Dunhuang mural aesthetics with contemporary art poster design, fluid line work, traditional seal script typography integration
Composition: centered figure with dynamic radial balance, full-body portrait surrounded by decorative elements, generous negative space for typography
Subject: flying apsara (飞天仙女) in elegant flowing pose holding a pipa (琵琶), wearing modernized Dunhuang mural-inspired costume with fluid ribbons rendered as dynamic flowing lines
Scene/backdrop: fusion of Dunhuang cave arch structures with modern geometric patterns, auspicious clouds, lotus flowers, pomegranate blossoms, and scattered petals
Lighting/mood: rich saturated colors with dramatic contrast, sense of divine movement and celestial grace
Color palette: traditional mineral pigments (azurite blue, cinnabar red, ochre) transitioning to modern gradients of purple and gold, opulent and culturally resonant
Materials/textures: smooth digital illustration with subtle texture suggesting mural surface, crisp vector-like edges for geometric elements
Text (verbatim): 融入传统篆刻元素的字体设计
Constraints: must balance traditional Dunhuang heritage with modern visual language; suitable for cultural brand promotion or festival celebration collateral
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; generic Behance flat style; over-cluttered composition; deformed hands or instrument proportions; washed-out colors
